summary: 从 main(292)开 feat/entity-linking-p1b2 起 #83 P1b-2a
设计达成一致:只造闸门(抽取外部)、精确 source/alias 匹配、不含影响分析(P1b-2b);决策树 + review 队列 update 语义 + approve 晋升/dismiss 保留
核心洞察:#61 解法是抽取输出当不可信候选过 review,而非把抽取器做准
entity-review.schema.json + ARTIFACT_KINDS + make_entity_review fixture;review_id_for over proposal 本质(幂等)

entity_review.py:ReviewQueue(update 语义 + schema/身份 gate + 原子写)+ import_proposals 精确匹配决策树(命中低置信/冲突→review、干净→no-op、未命中+译名→建 candidate+review、无译名→needs_target)+ resolve_review(approve 晋升 candidate→approved/locked、dismiss 保留)+ 坏 proposal fail-fast
抽取外部(proposals JSON,不跑 LLM)——#61 解法是输出当不可信候选过 review;review CLI import/list/approve/dismiss + Makefile
+12 测试(决策树每分支/幂等/晋升/锁定/dismiss/队列 gate);基线 292→304;docs §8.2 + PROJECT_STATUS;drift+validate 绿

next_action.instruction: 开 PR partially addresses #83 P1b-2a,合并
